zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick於1323年3月出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾托瓦爾德時，他的父親Duncan Kirkpatrick43歲，母親Isabel De Torthorwald44歲。他於1403年與Isobel Torthorwald在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾登斯可雷結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年6月4日在他的家鄉享年102歲。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick was born in March 1323, in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Duncan Kirkpatrick, was 43 and his mother, Isabel De Torthorwald, was 44. He married Isobel Torthorwald in 1403, in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 4 June 1425, in his hometown, at the age of 102.

Il a épousé Isobel Torthorwald en 1403, à Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1425, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 102 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Duncan Kirkpatrickが1323年3月にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアトルソルワルドで生まれた時，父Duncan Kirkpatrickは43歳，母Isabel De Torthorwaldは44歳であった。1403年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダンスコアでIsobel Torthorwaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年6月4日に故郷で102歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick(이)가 1323년 3월 스컷랜드 드프리실르 토르토월드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan Kirkpatrick(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel De Torthorwald(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1403년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 던스코어에서 Isobel Torthorwald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 6월 4일 그의 고향에서 102세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Isobel Torthorwald в 1403 г. в местности дунскор, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери.
